name: Requirements Human Review Rework Pipeline
description: Realistic content-planning workflow with a human approval gate before downstream packaging.
outcome: A product brief passes through human review before launch packaging continues.

definition.process_instructions: The product strategist drafts the brief. The technical editor refines it. A human review gate decides whether the brief is approved, sent back for changes, or rejected. Only after human approval may the launch planner package the final rollout packet.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: approval-gate
stages.goal: A human decision exists for the brief.

stages.name: launch-packaging
stages.goal: The approved launch packet is ready.
